scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w requesto-backend" "npm run dev -w requesto-frontend" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run dev -w requesto-backend" "npm run dev -w requesto-frontend" "npm run dev -w requesto-electron" --names "backend,frontend,electron" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta"
scripts.build: npm run build -w requesto-backend && npm run build -w requesto-frontend && npm run build -w requesto-electron
scripts.package:electron: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run package -w requesto-electron
scripts.package:electron:win: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run package:win -w requesto-electron
scripts.version: npm version %npm_package_version% --no-git-tag-version -w requesto-electron && git add apps/electron/package.json
